when_refund_possible: Connectivity or service issues: If unable to connect to proxies or experience service problems that support team cannot resolve within 24 hours
For ISP and Datacenter Proxies: total traffic usage must not exceed 500 MB at time of request
Subscription cancellation: If charged for subscription meant to cancel or cancelled too late
when_refund_not_possible: Cryptocurrency payments: Unable to process refunds for payments made via cryptocurrency
Deleted accounts: If account was deleted while service was still active, remaining service period is non-refundable
Requests made 24 hours or more after charge
Traffic usage has exceeded 500 MB (for ISP/Datacenter)
refund_policy.notes: Separate policies for Residential proxies and Mobile proxies with specific conditions.

terms_of_service.summary: Users must ensure use complies with laws and regulations. IPRoyal provides standard services according to user instructions and is not responsible for legal compliance of user use.

acceptable_use_policy.notes: No explicit AUP found but general terms apply.

support.notes: FAQ section covers billing, pricing, free trial, coupons, and payment methods.
